title: Guacamole
ingredients: 1 small tomato, seeded and diced finely
1 tsp. good quality salt (Maldon is my preference)
Juice from one lime or more to taste
¼ cup chopped red onions or green onions, optional
Pico de gallo or salsa, optional
instructions: Peel and halve avocados and place in bowl.
Smash with pastry blender or fork.
Taste and adjust seasonings and heat as desired.
notes: Good quality salt (or can use good quality garlic salt) is a must!

When first moving to Utah, it was challenging to find good Hass avocados, so sour cream was frequently added to extend the guacamole. With better avocado availability, sour cream is usually not needed.
Have fun with this recipe! Make it your own.
Optional ingredients like jalapeños, roasted green peppers, hot sauce, pico de gallo, salsa, and cotija cheese can be added to customize the guacamole.
